message:
Merge PR #2742: fix: resolve gt binary path in Gemini hook templates at install time

Replace PATH export approach in Gemini templates with {{GT_BIN}}
placeholder resolved at install time via os.Executable/LookPath.
Fixes Gemini CLI hook failures caused by enormous PATH expansion.

Supersedes PR #2736 (separate export statements).

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2742
Author: seanbearden
